Article.ArticleTitle: Real-Time stability enhancement of DDPMSG-based tidal hybrid power systems using heuristic optimization.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Electrical Engineering, King Khalid University, Abha, Saudi Arabia.
Institute of Power Engineering, National Energy University, Kualalumpur, 43000, Malaysia.
Centre for Promotion of Research, Graphic Era (Deemed to be University), Clementtown, Dehradun, India.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
